title: ci: validate workflow run SHA before uploading release assets
author: skools-here

findings.description: inputs.run_ids injected directly into shell here-string; store in env var first to avoid shell metacharacter issues.
run_id=$(echo $run_id | xargs) should quote $run_id to prevent word splitting.
Uses git rev-list locally to resolve tag SHA — no extra API call needed.
Fail-fast on first SHA mismatch prevents partial artifact uploads.
